message: the user wants something persisted — run write-gate first: classify SCOPE (this-skill/cross-skill/cross-repo/canon — unclassified = unbanked, LEARNING_CONTRACT §1) before scoring its signal (decisions / errors / architecture / code / numbers) and requiring a why-clause if it's a decision (`write_gate.py gate --scope <scope>`). Don't save what the repo/graph/chat already records; one fact per file with a one-line summary on top; update an existing note over a duplicate; delete notes that turn out wrong.
